next_steps: Perform CSF testing for arboviruses (specifically Powassan virus IgM and PCR)
Perform CSF testing for JC virus DNA PCR
Perform CSF testing for VZV DNA PCR
Perform CSF testing for paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels
Repeat CSF cytology and flow cytometry, potentially adding immunohistochemistry for lymphoma markers
Consider brain biopsy if non-invasive infectious/malignancy workup remains inconclusive
Maintain supportive care and continue broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage pending specific results
